Headline: #55 Garfield Temporary Westbound Reroute near Garfield/Red Line
ShortDescription: Westbound 55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Garfield/Red Line.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via Garfield, Wentworth, 51st, Wells, Garfield and over regular route, due to street blockage near Garfield/Red Line.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Brown Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Brown Line trains are running with delays due to an earlier mechanical problem.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Brown Line trains are running with delays due to an earlier mechanical problem.

At this time, consider other alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.
